mentions.note: Payroll software seen as AI-vulnerable by market; Cramer notes similar disenfranchisement narrative as ADP despite need for unemployment/tax compliance.
Q3 beat: 20% revenue growth, 22% op income growth, 27% cash flow YTD. Agentic AI payroll live, largest proprietary payroll data. HR department for SMBs, not just tech. PE shrinkage unjustified.
Payroll processor under AI threat (OpenAI, Anthropic); 4.7% yield insufficient defense; longs vs. shorts in shadow boxing—unclear winner.
